narrative:
Montpelier Ex Vill Sd (Williams) exempted village school district has 3,582 registered voters, with 58.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.2 percentage points.
